detail.description: Tommy Troy singles on a soft ground ball to pitcher Aaron Ashby.
Tommy Troy singles on a ground ball to shortstop Christian Koss, deflected by shortstop Christian Koss. Pavin Smith to 2nd.
Tommy Troy singles on a line drive to right fielder Heliot Ramos. Nolan Arenado to 3rd.
Tommy Troy singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Trevor Larnach. Jorge Barrosa to 3rd.
Tommy Troy singles on a bunt ground ball to catcher Victor Caratini.
Tommy Troy singles on a fly ball to center fielder Jose Siri. Jordan Lawlar scores.
Tommy Troy triples (1) on a line drive to center fielder Jose Siri. Ildemaro Vargas scores.
Tommy Troy singles on a soft ground ball to shortstop CJ Abrams. Geraldo Perdomo to 2nd.
Tommy Troy singles on a ground ball to left fielder Daylen Lile.
Tommy Troy singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Andy Pages.
Tommy Troy singles on a line drive to right fielder Kyle Tucker. Jorge Barrosa to 3rd.
Tommy Troy singles on a bunt ground ball to third baseman Max Muncy.
Tommy Troy homers (1) on a fly ball to left field.
Tommy Troy doubles (2) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Jake McCarthy.
Tommy Troy doubles (1) on a fly ball to left fielder Troy Johnston. Aramis Garcia to 3rd.
Tommy Troy hits a ground-rule double (3) on a line drive to right-center field. Gabriel Moreno scores.
Tommy Troy singles on a fly ball to second baseman JJ Wetherholt, deflected by right fielder Jordan Walker. Corbin Carroll scores. Nolan Arenado to 2nd.
Tommy Troy homers (3) on a fly ball to center field.
Tommy Troy singles on a ground ball to right fielder Will Brennan.
Tommy Troy singles on a ground ball to right fielder Victor Bericoto. Gabriel Moreno to 2nd.
Tommy Troy singles on a line drive to right fielder Drew Gilbert.
Tommy Troy singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Gavin Sheets.
Tommy Troy homers (4) on a fly ball to left center field. Lourdes Gurriel Jr. scores.
Tommy Troy singles on a sharp ground ball to left fielder Samad Taylor.
Tommy Troy homers (2) on a fly ball to left field.
Tommy Troy singles on a soft line drive to center fielder Jakob Marsee.
